title: NGX At Annual Investment Meeting Dubai
description: L – R shows Mr. Temi Popoola, Chief Executive Officer, Nigerian Exchange Limited; Mr. Lamido Yuguda, Director General, Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC); Mr. Dayo Obisan, Executive Commissioner
html: L – R shows Mr. Temi Popoola, Chief Executive Officer, Nigerian Exchange Limited; Mr. Lamido Yuguda, Director General, Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC); Mr. Dayo Obisan, Executive Commissioner, Operations, SEC and Mr. Haruna Jalo-Waziri, Chief Executive Officer, Central Securities Clearing System Plc, at the Annual Investment Meeting (AIM), themed “Investments in Sustainable Innovation for a Thriving Future”, in Dubai on Wednesday, 30 March 2022.
